title: Initech — net-zero target-setting workshop
transcript: Priya (Initech, Director of Investor Relations): We want to commit to a net-zero target aligned with SBTi. Tom (Initech, Chief Operating Officer): Our biggest challenge is the Scope 3 downstream emissions from product use. Consultant: We decided that Initech will pursue a near-term SBTi target covering Scopes 1, 2, and upstream Scope 3, with a separate flagged commitment on downstream emissions pending a product-redesign feasibility study. Tom: That's pragmatic. Consultant: I'll submit the SBTi commitment letter on behalf of Initech by June 3. Priya: And the feasibility study timeline? Consultant: I'll send you a scope and timeline proposal for the product-redesign feasibility study by June 10. Consultant: One important insight from SBTi submissions I've worked on — it's worth over-communicating the target to employees before the public announcement, because internal buy-in gaps become visible very quickly once the press release goes out. Tom: Good point. We'll brief the operations team first.
